title: Know your normal
detail: Notice how your breasts usually look and feel across the month. Normal can be different for every person.

title: Look in the mirror
detail: Check shape, size, skin texture, redness, dimpling, swelling, or nipple changes with arms relaxed and raised.

title: Use finger pads
detail: Use the pads of three fingers to feel in small circles. Cover the whole breast area and underarm.

title: Change pressure
detail: Use light, medium, and firm pressure so you can feel tissue near the skin and deeper tissue.

title: Check nipples
detail: Look for new pulling in, rash, pain, or discharge that is not breast milk.

title: Record and act
detail: Write down new changes and dates. Contact a healthcare professional for changes that are new, persistent, or worrying.
